description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a dusting of white flour across its surface. The loaf features three prominent, curved scoring marks on the top, which have opened up during baking to reveal a slightly lighter interior. The crust appears uneven and rugged, with natural cracks and a matte finish, suggesting an artisanal baking process. The bread's surface is mostly matte with some roughness, and the coloration transitions from pale beige to deeper brown tones. There are no visible seeds or toppings, and the loaf is unsliced, maintaining its whole, domed shape. The overall appearance is hearty and traditional, reminiscent of a country-style boule.
description: A round, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust, white flour dusting, and three curved scoring marks on top. The surface is rugged and matte, with natural cracks and a traditional artisanal look.
description_view_0: This view highlights the domed top with three deep, curved scoring marks and a prominent dusting of flour.
description_view_1: The loaf appears flatter from this angle, with the scoring marks more evenly spaced and the flour dusting more pronounced.
description_view_2: This side shows the rounded edge and the rugged, cracked crust, with less visible flour and more brown coloration.
description_view_3: The scoring marks curve around the loaf, and the crust appears darker and more textured, with the flour dusting less visible.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features three deep, curved scoring marks across the top, with a rugged, cracked texture and a dusting of white flour. The surface is uneven and rustic, with no visible seeds or toppings.
